UW-17  PLUG WELDS. (a) Plug welds may be used for the attachment of non-pressure parts to pressure components, subject to the limitations of this paragraph. (b) Plug welds shall not be used as the sole means of attachment for pressure-retaining joints. (c) The diameter and depth of plug welds shall meet the minimum requirements specified herein. Fillet weld sizing requirements of UW-35 shall apply when fillet welds are used in combination. For general welding requirements, see UW-14. Welding procedures shall be qualified per QW-200. Refer to UW-16 for attachment weld requirements at openings.
